_note: Imagemap sends a single image with tappable hotspot areas. The LINE client fetches the image from '{baseUrl}/{width}' — all five widths (240, 300, 460, 700, 1040) MUST be pre-served at those paths; do NOT include a file extension in baseUrl. baseSize.width must always be 1040. Area coordinates are relative to the 1040-wide reference frame. Actions can be 'uri' (opens URL), 'message' (sends text as user), or 'clipboard' (copies text, LINE v14.0.0+). An optional 'video' overlay can be layered on top. altText is required as a fallback for unsupported clients (max 400 chars).
